nodes.name: Black-bellied antwren
nodes.summary: Black-bellied antwren（Black-bellied antwren，学名 Formicivora melanogaster），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联13个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括灌丛。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: bahiae is found in northeastern Brazil in an area roughly bounded by extreme eastern Maranhão, Rio Grande do Norte, and northern Bahia. The black-bellied antwren inhabits the understorey to mid-storey of tropical deciduous forest, gallery forest, caatinga scrublands, and the ecotone between caatinga and cerrado
